extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai defended 1:25 GC lead over CARAPAZ Richard in final 17.4km Verona ITT, matching times within 1 second to secure first Australian Giro victory.
tactical_patterns: Stage 20's KEMNER Leonard domestique work proved decisive, creating 1:25 buffer too large for 17.4km ITT reversal.
SOBRERO Matteo's Italian championship skinsuit win suggests aero gains from national kit choice in non-Grand Tour TTs.

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: Matched CARAPAZ within 1 second at climb summit despite less specialized TT pedigree, showing mental control under historic pressure.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: Strong ITT on 29th birthday but 1:25 deficit from Stage 20 collapse proved insurmountable over 17.4km.
rider_signals.SOBRERO Matteo: positive: Won by 22.6 seconds over IRONSIDE, signaling breakthrough beyond national championship specialty performances.
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: positive: Stage 20 domestique effort for HINDLEY created winning GC margin, revealing Bora's commitment to GC support depth.
